td.ul:
Instruction or information on performing illegal activities
Instruction or information on avoiding law enforcement
Recruiting or organizing people for criminal gangs or illegal activities

Instruction or information on performing questionable or illegal activities with the use of software and/or computer equipment
Cracked or pirated software information and downloads
Recruiting or organizing people to perform hacking activities

Instruction or information on growing or manufacturing illegal substances
Information on using illegal substances
Information on abusing normal everyday or over-the-counter substances
Buying, selling, or distributing illegal substances

Advocating intolerance or hate against any group of people based on race, gender, lifestyle, or nationality
Recruiting or organizing people for a gang or cult that advocates hate and/or intolerance

Sites or services that are used for phishing schemes to steal users’ personal information
Instruction or information on performing identify theft, phishing schemes, cheating, or fraudulent activity
Services to perform or aid in cheating or fraudulent activity
Sites confirmed by Barracuda Central as the destination for emails with Spam intent

Excessive use of profanity or obscenities
Containing information or humor that is offensive or disgusting

Instruction or information on performing terrorist activities
Recruiting or organizing people for militant, extremist, or terrorist organizations
Descriptions or images of violence, torture, mutilation, gore, or death

Instruction or information on creating or using weapons or poisonous substances
Buying, selling, or distributing weapons or poisonous substances
Training people to use weapons for killing, violence, or destruction

Containing images of nude men or women
Adult dating services or single listings with sexual images or content
Escort services or strip clubs
Sexual enhancement products or techniques
Buying, selling, or distributing sex toys, sex videos, or other sex-related products
Groups or forums focused on sexual subjects
Containing extensive images of models in swimsuits or lingerie

Containing images or video of sexual acts or fetishes
Explicit cartoons and animation featuring sex acts
Descriptions or stories of sexual acts or fetishes
Child Pornography/Pedophilia

Online gambling and virtual casinos
Online betting
Lottery

Game information or reviews
Game advice or tips

Online game playing
Game downloads

Banner advertisements
Pop-up advertisements
Adware
Online auctions

General corporate or business sites
Business listings or yellow pages
Business services

Online banking
Bill-pay services
Stock quotes and tickers
Stock or equity trading
Money management, investment, or financial planning
Loan and mortgage
Tax and accounting

Job search engines and job listing services
Career-networking
Employment agencies

Home and property search engines and listing services
Rental search engines and listing services
Home or property buying guides
Real estate agent services

Online consumer shopping
Product catalog lists of items for sale
Classified ads

Online chat
Instant messenger
Serves media from content providers to Internet

Software, shareware, and freeware download services for computers, phones, PDAs
Music, movies, media download services

Weblogs (blogs)
Online discussion forums
Newsgroups
Personal Web site hosting

Anonymous surfing
Proxy services to circumvent content filtering
Peer-to-peer file sharing

Online directories and Web site search engines
Content portal sites

Online communities for connecting and networking with people
Social planning services

Sites known to install malicious programs or viruses
Unsolicited web-traffic monitoring or information gathering services

Audio or video streaming services
Internet TV and radio
Webcam services
VoIP (Voice over IP) or telephone services via your computer

Online email accounts
SMS or text-messaging

Promoting alcohol or tobacco use
Information, reviews, or tips about alcohol or tobacco
Buying, selling, or distributing alcohol or tobacco

Online comics
Focused on jokes or comedians
Designed to be humorous or funny

Information, discussion, or reviews on television, movies, music, or video
Celebrity fan sites
Information or reviews on night clubs, festivals, or social events

Reviews or information on places to eat, dine, or drink
Recipes, instructions, or information about food or drinks

Indoor and outdoor recreational activities
Information or advice on hobbies
Associations, clubs, or forums dedicated to hobbies
Animal and pet related sites

Information or advice on home improvement, home repair, or interior decoration
Information or advice on garden design or gardening
Designed for children

Information, reviews, tips on motor vehicles
Motor vehicle searching, trading, or commerce
Focused on automobile modification, repair, or customization
Associations, clubs, or forums dedicated to motor vehicles

Dating services, singles listings, matchmaking
Information or advice on dating, relationships, romance

Focused on searching for images or pictures
Online photo albums and photo exchange

Sports team or league sites
Information, discussion, forums dedicated to sports
Fantasy sports information and leagues

Travel booking agencies or sites for airline, car, hotel, etc.
Travel package listings and searches
Destination guides and tourist information
Information or reviews on vacations, destinations, travel modes, accommodations, or companies

Artists, art galleries, museums
Performing arts (musical or theatrical)
Companies or studios that offer training for the arts
Book reviews
Stories or poetry

Information or reviews on computer, electronic, or technology-related items (systems, accessories, parts, software)
Computer, electronic, or technology resources or tutorials
Computer, electronic, or technology industries and trends

Educational institutions
Online classes and courses
Online teaching resources and services

Local, state, and national government sites and services
Information or forums for politics or elections
Information or resources for laws and regulations
Legal services and resources

Medical information on ailments and conditions for both mental and physical issues
Information or reviews on drugs or medicines
Medical procedures
Fitness and health services and resources
Medical insurance
Local, national, and international news

Information, discussion, or forums dedicated to political issues
Activist group sites

Dictionaries or encyclopedias
Maps and directions
Almanacs or census statistics

Religious organization sites
Places of worship

Information or resources on the different fields of science (astronomy, biology, chemistry, environmental, math, physics, social)

Resources for discussing sex in relationships and communicating sexual topics
Information and resources on birth control, contraceptives, sexually transmitted diseases, or pregnancy

Home and family topics and resources
Parenting and family planning
Social etiquette
Foreign cultures
